$comment: AITP v0.1 Ed25519 keypair known-answer test vectors. Pinned reference values for cross-implementation interop. RFC-AITP-0001 §5.3 references this file. Each entry takes a 32-byte seed and pins the resulting raw Ed25519 public key (base64url, unpadded, 43 chars) and the corresponding aid:pubkey: identifier.

vectors.$comment: Added to support 3-hop multi-hop delegation fixtures (RFC-AITP-0011). Standard deterministic seed pattern (0x01 repeated 32 times); a 4-byte distinct-from-the-other-three seed is sufficient for cross-impl interop, since the AID derivation is fixed by Ed25519.

First non-Ed25519 reference keypair. Added in v0.2 to support cross-impl conformance for RFC-AITP-0001 §5.4.3 algorithm-tagged signatures. Algorithm: ECDSA on P-256 with SHA-256. Private scalar is the 32-byte big-endian integer 0x05*32 (mod n); public key is the SEC1 compressed point form (33 bytes). The aid grammar uses the v0.2 algorithm-tagged form `aid:pubkey:p256:<44-char-base64url>`.
